items.briefing:
Australians are being warned to watch out for food delivery scams, with Scamwatch flagging fraudulent activity targeting people ordering online — be cautious of fake delivery notifications or payment requests. Separately, the Privacy Commissioner has found that Optus breached privacy obligations related to White Pages listings, a reminder that organisations must handle personal information carefully under Australian privacy law. The government has also launched its Horizon 2 action plan, the next phase of Australia's national cyber security strategy, signalling increased focus on cyber resilience across sectors.

**Tip:** If you receive an unexpected message about a food delivery or payment issue, go directly to the official app or website rather than clicking any links in the message.

featured.title: Government launches Horizon 2 action plan for Australia’s cyber security strategy
featured.quote: Australia's government launches Horizon 2 cyber security strategy, shaping national digital defense priorities.
